results.rendered_html: apnas n. ops, Ertrag, Besitz, Habe: aṃśeva no bhajataṃ citramapnaḥ  ṚV. 10,106,9 . te saubhagaṃ vīravadgomadapno dadhātana draviṇaṃ citramasme 36,13 . yaccitramapna uṣaso vahanti 1,113,20 . 9 . 80,2 . 106,9 . Vgl. anapnas, dānāpnas, svapnas. Nach  NAIGH. 2,1 . und  Uṇ. 4 . 209 : Werk, nach  NAIGH. 2,2 : Nachkommenschaft, nach 3,7 : Gestalt. — Vielleicht in etym. Zusammenh. mit āp.

results.rendered_html:
apnaḥ, apnas n. [āp -asun nuṭ thasvaśca,  Uṇ. 4. 207 ]
1 Possession, property.
2 Work, sacrificial act or rite, any act.
3 Offspring.
4 Form, shape.
5 To be obtained (used actively); [cf. L. ops.]
Comp.
— stha a. superintending work (karmaṇyadhikṛta); (or m.) proprietor of an estate.
— rājaḥ lord of wealth or property, illustrious by means of works; directing works to be done (karmapreraka).
